name: Claros Appliance Dictionary
description: Internal appliance passport dictionary used as a reference pattern for future modular Digital Product Passport categories.

authority.derivationNotice: This dictionary is curated by Claros DPP for implementation use and should be versioned or replaced when an official appliance semantic model is adopted.

versioning.compatibilityPolicy: IRIs under /dictionary/appliance/v1 remain stable for non-breaking revisions. Breaking semantic changes require a new version path and semantic model key.

interoperabilityProfile.termModel: Each dictionary term is represented as a dereferenceable RDF property and SKOS concept with explicit data type, category, and application field mapping metadata.
